findings.text: Arrears notice from Edinburgh Napier University to ANFAL ELBUSHRA for £5526.66, flat Bedroom B Flat 05 Castlelaw House, student number 40805511.
Notice to Quit date: 18 May 2026; payment required by 9 May 2026.
OCR confidence is low (0.65) with garbled characters; re-OCR or manual verification recommended.
Arrears amount £5526.66 may be inaccurate due to OCR errors; verify against original image.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Re-OCR / Manual Verification of NAP-SRC-0019

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0019 (WhatsApp Image)
**Current OCR Confidence:** 0.65 (Tesseract)
**Issues:** Garbled characters, low confidence.

**Recommendation:** Perform re-OCR using a higher-quality engine (e.g., Google Cloud Vision, Azure OCR) or manually transcribe the image. Key fields to verify:
- Arrears amount: £5526.66
- NTQ Date: 18 May 2026
- Payment Required: 9 May 2026
- Student Name: ANFAL ELBUSHRA
- Flat Address: Bedroom B Flat 05 Castlelaw House
- Student Number: 40805511
- Guarantor name and address

**Next Steps:**
1. Re-run OCR with alternative engine.
2. If still low confidence, request human review.
3. Update extracted text artifact with corrected version.
proposed_artifacts.title: Re-OCR or Manual Verification Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-OCR source NAP-SRC-0019 using a higher-quality OCR engine (e.g., Google Cloud Vision or Azure OCR) to improve confidence. Compare with current Tesseract output and produce a corrected extracted text artifact.
